title: Coney Island Ballpark
summary: An Episode 3 main mission to rescue virologist Vitaly Tchernenko from Black Tusk captivity at Coney Island.

claims.text: Coney Island Ballpark is one of the two main missions introduced with Episode 3.
Black Tusk holds Vitaly Tchernenko at the ballpark, and the Division mission is to rescue him.
Tchernenko is considered important to efforts to mass-produce a broad-spectrum antiviral against Green Poison.

paragraphs.text: The ballpark objective connects Episode 3 directly to the antiviral storyline: Agents establish a foothold, locate Tchernenko and attempt to remove him from Black Tusk custody.

verification.notes: Dialogue and objective-by-objective transcription remain pending direct capture.
